one_time_description: Impairment loss recognized on investment in Yarmouth Bar Fisheries Limited due to accumulated losses and management assessment of future operations
economic_notes: First Nation operates Glooscap Corner (convenience store, gaming, gas bar), Glooscap Landing #1 (fuel gas bar and Sweetgrass convenience store), Commercial Fisheries (three lobster fishing boats), Feta Cheese operation, and holds equity investments in Landing #2, Glooscap Energy #1, Glooscap Energy #2, Seakist Lobster, and Yarmouth Bar Fisheries. WEB Weavers Mountain Wind LP formed during year for proposed wind energy facility. Additions to Reserve approved for three parcels of land owned by Landing #1.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2023 (not 2024 as template default). Province is Nova Scotia. Five GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis: Landing #2, Glooscap Energy #1, Glooscap Energy #2, Seakist Lobster, Yarmouth Bar (52% owned). Three fully consolidated subsidiaries: Glooscap Ilia Gourmet Foods LP (ceased ops 2020), Glooscap Landing #1 LP, Glooscap Economic Development Corporation. Impairment loss of $533,276 on Yarmouth Bar investment. Grant payable of $794,046 outstanding to ISC since 2021 with no repayments made. ACOA demand loan of $907,074 overdue since January 2020. FNFA demand loan of $1,791,910 included in 2024 principal repayments. Prior period restatements identified in Yarmouth Bar ($626,211) and Seakist Lobster ($445,310) with no impact to investment carrying values. Seakist Lobster has covenant breaches and going concern risk at subsidiary level. Housing units: 10 CMHC subsidized projects. expenses_housing calculated as Band Housing ($40,628) + CMHC Housing ($151,251) = $191,879. No remuneration schedule included in extracted text.
